2606.31058.title: Exploring the relationship between team institutional composition and novelty in academic papers based on fine-grained knowledge entities
2606.31058.paper_summary: The composition of author teams is an important factor influencing the novelty of academic papers. However, existing studies have paid limited attention to the role of institutional composition, and most novelty measures remain at a general level, making it difficult to explain the specific sources and types of novelty in papers. Taking the field of natural language processing as an example, this study investigates the relationship between team institutional composition and the fine-grained novelty of academic papers. Author teams are classified into three types: academic institutions, industrial institutions, and mixed academic and industrial institutions. Four types of fine-grained knowledge entities are extracted from full-text papers, including methods, datasets, tools, and metrics. The novelty of papers is then measured based on entity combinations, and pairwise combinations of different entity types are further analyzed to examine their contributions to novel papers. The results show that, in the field of natural language processing, collaboration between industrial and academic institutions is more likely to produce novel papers than purely industrial collaboration. From the perspective of fine-grained knowledge entities, mixed academic and industrial teams pay more attention to the novelty of method-metric combinations, whereas industrial teams pay more attention to the novelty of method-tool combinations. This study reveals the relationship between institutional team composition and paper novelty through fine-grained novelty measurement, providing useful evidence for improving paper quality and promoting industry-academia-research collaboration.
2606.31058.paper_summary_zh: 作者團隊的組成是影響學術論文新穎性的重要因素。<lb/>然而，現有研究對於機構組成的角色關注有限，大多數新穎性衡量仍停留在一般層面，難以解釋論文中新穎性的具體來源和類型。<lb/>以自然語言處理領域為例，本研究調查了團隊機構組成與學術論文細緻新穎性之間的關係。<lb/>作者團隊被分為三種類型：學術機構、工業機構和混合學術與工業機構。<lb/>從全文論文中提取了四種類型的細緻知識實體，包括方法、數據集、工具和指標。<lb/>然後根據實體組合來衡量論文的新穎性，並進一步分析不同實體類型的成對組合，以檢查它們對新穎論文的貢獻。<lb/>結果顯示，在自然語言處理領域，工業與學術機構之間的合作比純粹的工業合作更可能產生新穎論文。<lb/>從細緻知識實體的角度來看，混合學術與工業團隊更關注方法-指標組合的新穎性，而工業團隊則更關注方法-工具組合的新穎性。<lb/>本研究通過細緻的新穎性測量揭示了機構團隊組成與論文新穎性之間的關係，為提高論文質量和促進產學研合作提供了有用的證據。
2606.31058.author: Ziling Chen et.al.
2606.31058.authors: Ziling Chen, Chengzhi Zhang, Heng Zhang, Yi Zhao, Chen Yang, Yang Yang
